_COMMENT: Educator Configuration - For teachers, coaches, course creators, and tutors
_USAGE: Copy this to config.json and customize with your teaching niche

brand.name: MathWithYourName
brand.tagline: Making calculus actually make sense for everyone
brand.scarcity: Enrollment closes Friday - Only 10 spots left

niche.targetAudience: High school and college students struggling with math
painPoints: Confusing textbook explanations that don't help
Teachers who go too fast or don't answer questions
Test anxiety and poor study habits

brandVoice.style: Like a tutor who actually cares and explains things clearly

features: Downloadable study guides and cheat sheets

topics: Common calculus mistakes and how to fix them
Student success stories and grade improvements
Study tips and exam prep strategies
